zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Holland於1387年出生在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，她的父親Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent37歲，母親Alice FitzAlan38歲。她於1399年5月23日與Thomas Montagu結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年10月18日享年18歲，埋葬在英國波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Holland于1387年出生在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，她的父亲Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent37岁，母亲Alice FitzAlan38岁。她于1399年5月23日与Thomas Montagu结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年10月18日享年18岁，埋葬在英国波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Howland
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Holland was born in 1387, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, her father, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, was 37 and her mother, Alice FitzAlan, was 38. She married Thomas Montagu on 23 May 1399. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 18 October 1405, at the age of 18, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Holland est née en 1387, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzAlan, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Montagu le 23 mai 1399. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1405, à l’âge de 18 ans, et a été enterrée à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Holland 1387 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent 37 und ihre Mutter Alice FitzAlan 38. Sie hat am 23. Mai 1399 Thomas Montagu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1405 im Alter von 18 Jahren und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Holland è nata il nel 1387 nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Alice FitzAlan, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Montagu il 23 maggio 1399. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 18 ottobre 1405, all'età di 18 anni, e fu sepolta a Bisham, Berkshire, England.

ja.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Hollandが1387年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kentは37歳，母Alice FitzAlanは38歳であった。1399年5月23日にThomas Montaguと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年10月18日に18歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Holland(이)가 1387년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice FitzAlan(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1399년 5월 23일 Thomas Montagu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 10월 18일 18세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Holland nasceu em 1387, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzAlan, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Montagu em 23 de maio de 1399. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1405, com 18 anos, e foi sepultada em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Holland родилась в 1387 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzAlan, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Montagu 23 мая 1399 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 октября 1405 г. в возрасте 18 лет и была похоронена в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Holland nació en 1387, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice FitzAlan, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Thomas Montagu el 23 de mayo de 1399. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1405, a la edad de 18 años, y fue sepultada en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
